Our Story

Growing More Than
Just Crops

Nestled in the heart of Chintakunta Village, Putlur Mandal, Anantapur District, Chandrafarms is a family-owned farm built on a single belief — that food grown with love and without chemicals is the best gift you can give your family.

For over a decade, we've been cultivating pomegranates, mosambi, groundnuts, and Bengal gram using traditional and sustainable farming methods. No pesticides. No artificial fertilizers. Just rich Andhra soil, clean water, and the dedication of real farmers.

Kummetha Chandra Sekhar Reddy Founder
Kummetha Chakradhar Reddy Co-Founder · Chintakunta Village, Anantapur

Why Chandrafarms

The Chandrafarms Difference

We don't just sell produce — we deliver trust, freshness, and a direct connection to the land that grew your food.

🌿

Zero Chemicals

We never use pesticides or artificial fertilizers. Every product is as pure as nature intended, safe for your family.

👨‍🌾

Direct from Farmer

Buy directly from us — the people who grow your food. No middlemen means better prices and fresher produce for you.

🌅

Freshly Harvested

We harvest only on demand. Your order is picked fresh from the farm and packed within hours for maximum freshness.

🚚

Fast Delivery

Local same-day delivery and pan-India courier shipping available. Your farm-fresh order reaches you quickly and safely.

Farm Fresh Products

Straight from Our Farm

Handpicked, sun-ripened, and packed fresh. Every product tells the story of the Anantapur soil.

Delivery Information

We Deliver Everywhere

From Anantapur to your doorstep, we ensure your farm-fresh order arrives quickly and in perfect condition.

🏘️

Local Delivery

Same-day delivery available in Anantapur District. Order before noon and receive your fresh produce by evening!

📦

Pan-India Courier

We ship across all major Indian cities via trusted courier partners. Carefully packed to ensure freshness during transit.

⚡

Express Dispatch

Orders are harvested and dispatched within 24 hours of confirmation. We prioritize speed without compromising quality.

Customer Reviews

What Our Customers Say

Real stories from real people who experienced the Chandrafarms difference.

★★★★★

The pomegranates from Chandrafarms are incredibly sweet and juicy! You can clearly taste the difference — no chemicals, just pure fruit. My family loved them. Will definitely reorder!

Pomegranate

★★★★★

Ordered 10kg of groundnuts for Diwali. They were fresh, crunchy, and far better than anything from the market. Chakradhar bhai packed them so well — no damage at all. Highly recommended!

Bengaluru, Karnataka
Groundnuts

Mosambi
